description: Unlock the potential of higher education and let your degree make a difference with this engaging email template. Perfect for student recruitment, this template offers relevant application information, updates on college events, and insights into campus tours. It's an ideal tool for universities aiming to foster school spirit and promote the value of their programs. This template, falling under the Education and Newsletter categories, is not just about informing, but also about inspiring potential students to impact the world positively with their education. It's more than just a newsletter; it's a compelling call to action for those seeking to make a difference through higher education.
short_description: Unlock the potential of higher education with this engaging email template. Ideal for student recruitment, offering application information, college event updates, and campus tour insights. Foster school spirit and promote the value of university programs. It's not just a newsletter, it's a call to action for those seeking to make a difference.

designer.description: I’m a growth marketing manager with a strong copywriting and ideation background. I enjoy working to make a thought or vision come to life!

html_data:
Admissions | Contact Us | Events
 

Make A Difference

Earn your Degree at {School} and start making a difference the moment you enroll!

Learn More
 

Do you have what it takes to be a {mascot}?

See Requirements
 

Hear from students just like you!

College is more than just classes. It's meeting lifelong friends, finding what you're passion about and getting involved. Hear from the class of {2022} on why they chose to become a {mascot}.

Watch Video
 

Don't miss these upcoming deadlines!

10

AUGUST

Scholarships

All applications for University sponsored applications must be submitted by August 19th. If you have questions or need assistance with submitting your applications please reach out to example@email.com.

View All Scholarships
 

Early Applications

If you are submitting an early application, please have all necessary items in by August 15th. To learn more about the benefits of early applications, click below.

Early Application Details

15

AUGUST

 

31

SEPTEMBER

All Applications

All applications for the 2023 school year must be in by September 31st. To learn more about the minimum requirements for application, please visit the site below.

Application Requirements

Stay up-to-date with current activities and future events by following us on your favorite social media channels.

 

Contact Us
